title: Early impacts of penalty reform on VAT-registered businesses
body: "HMRC commissioned Verian (previously Kantar Public) to undertake research on exploring the experiences of a range of businesses impacted by reforms to penalties for late submission of VAT returns and late payment of VAT.  This was a qualitative study comprising of 48 in-depth interviews with VAT-registered businesses with a range of experience of the current and former penalty regimes, including some fully compliant businesses.   The views in this report are the authors’ own and do not necessarily reflect those of HM Revenue and Customs. "
